verdicts.note: Quote found; Criston leading 3600 men south supports COMMANDS_IN (command-tier leadership); nodes exist; tier-1 book quote
Quote found; Red Robb fires killing shots on Criston Cole supports AGENT_IN (performs the act); nodes exist; tier-1
Quote found; Criston struck by arrows supports VICTIM_IN; harm-gate pass (battle is harm subtype); nodes exist; tier-1
Quote contains straight apostrophe in 'I'll' but chapter file has curly apostrophe (UTF-8 342 200 231); exact byte match failed
Quote found; Roderick sounding the charge supports COMMANDS_IN (command-tier orderer); nodes exist; tier-1
Quote found; Garibald described as chief among three combatants in dented plate and mail supports FIGHTS_IN; subsequent narrative shows him leading charge into battle; nodes exist; tier-1
Quote found ('while the Greatjon had seized...'); seizing mines is direct execution of the act, supports AGENT_IN; nodes exist; tier-1

Quote found but only shows Stannis brooding in castle AFTER retreat; retreat itself happened off-page per proposal note; quote does not show Stannis PERFORMING the retreat action, only that he's isolated afterward
Quote found; Salladhor's ships evacuating surviving men is logistical non-combat involvement, supports PARTICIPATES_IN; nodes exist; tier-1

Quote found ('we saw them off, and buried three'); garrison commander title suggests COMMANDS_IN, but 'we saw them off' suggests personal combat participation (FIGHTS_IN). Defensible as command-tier coordination of defense but quote shows active fighting involvement; contextually could be either.

Quote found; Karstark's bounty offer incentivizes raiding but is not an explicit order; COMMANDS_IN traditionally means direct command or orderer-who-didn't-execute, not indirect bounty incentive. Proposal note justifies as 'instigator' but the quote itself is indirect motivation rather than explicit command.
Quote found; Balerion and Vhagar burning Dornish castles thrice over; Aegon flies Balerion, supports AGENT_IN (personally performs the burning); nodes exist; tier-1
Quote found (same as R3-12); Visenya flies Vhagar in the burning campaign, supports AGENT_IN; nodes exist; tier-1
Quote found; Visenya set upon in assassination attempt supports VICTIM_IN (receives the attack); harm-gate pass (assassination is harm subtype, event.battle supports VICTIM_IN); nodes exist; tier-1
Quote found; Jacaerys vows/issues call for dragonriders, does not personally attempt to mount dragon; supports COMMANDS_IN (orderer-who-didn't-execute); nodes exist; tier-1

Quote contains straight apostrophes in 'King's own' and 'blacksmith's bastard' but chapter file has curly apostrophes (UTF-8 342 200 231); exact byte match required per rules; apostrophe encoding mismatch
Quote found; Ulf mounting Silverwing demonstrates performing the act of taming the dragon, supports AGENT_IN; note correctly identifies 'man-atarms' as OCR artifact; nodes exist; tier-1
Quote found; Addam mounting Seasmoke supports AGENT_IN (performs the act of taming/riding); nodes exist; tier-1
This is a wiki-only candidate; orchestrator handles wiki_only rows separately per instructions
